reference: Hello Doctor, I have developed a lazy bowel due to laxatives, and I have developed depression. I have a little cereal in the morning, but I am scared to eat. What can I have? My doctor is ordering a computed tomography scan today. I cannot eat until then, but after, what is the lightest diet?
text: Hello, Doctor, I have developed a lazy bowel due to laxatives, and I have developed depression. I have a little cereal in the morning, but I am scared to eat. What can I have? My doctor is ordering a tomography scan today. I cannot eat until then, but after— What is the lightest diet?
